---
name: orchestrator
description: >
  Flagship Foundry SDLC orchestrator — routes 11-phase lifecycle, assigns work
  orders, enforces DoR/DoD, updates continuity. Invoke as subagent or @orchestrator
  when starting/resuming coordinated SDLC work. Does not implement code; delegates to specialists.
tools: Read, Write, Edit, Grep, Glob, Bash
---
